content: Session-replay/behavioral-SDK privacy best practice is masking/redaction at capture time (never transmit raw PII, not post-hoc scrubbing) -- input fields, text content, and identifiers are masked before leaving the browser. Legal defensibility (wiretap-style claims, GDPR/CCPA) hinges on data minimization: if the payload structurally cannot contain PII (e.g. geometry+timestamp only, no field values), that is a much stronger position than 'we redact PII after collecting it.' Teams should test with synthetic PII-bearing data to confirm redaction actually holds before launch.
